message:
test: pin string.h strcoll + strxfrm conformance via differential harness

Adds tests/conformance_diff_strcoll_strxfrm.rs covering 2 functions:
- strcoll: 12 string pairs in C locale, sign-only comparison
  (magnitude is implementation-defined per POSIX)
- strxfrm: size-query then transform, verifies the POSIX consistency
  invariant strcmp(xfrm(a), xfrm(b)).sign == strcoll(a, b).sign for
  both impls.

3 tests pass, 0 divergences against glibc.

Bead: bd-clxf1
